title: pterostylis littoralis
intro: Pterostylis littoralis, also known as the coastal greenhood, is a species of orchid native to Australia. It has been found to have medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and rheumatism. The health benefits of Pterostylis littoralis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
